title: Top 10 Funding Rounds: AI, LegalTech, HealthTech, Robotics ...
full_text:
Top 10 Pre-seed to Series A funding rounds of the week:
Top 10 Pre-seed to Series A funding rounds of the week:
⚫ AI ⚫
🔶 1. Jedify, a platform that builds context graphs that help AI agents understand a company's data, permissions, workflows, and terminology, raised a $24M Series A round.
→ Investors: Norwest, Snowflake Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Assaf Henkin, Adi Elimelech, Erik Shani
🔶 2. Niteshift, a platform that provides cloud development environments where AI coding agents can run, test, and verify software, raised a $7M seed round.
→ Investors: Greylock, Amplify Partners, Lux Capital, BoxGroup, SV Angel
→ Founded by: Sajid Mehmood, Conor Branagan
🔶 3. Concentrate AI a platform that routes AI tasks across different models so developers can control token costs, raised a $5M pre-seed round.
→ Investors: True Ventures, RRE Ventures
→ Founded by: Ari Jacoby, Todd Lieberman, Zach Moskow
🔶 4. RELAI, a platform that analyzes AI agent failures and feedback to identify root causes and update prompts, workflows, and memory, raised a $5.4M pre-seed round.
→ Investors: .406 Ventures, AI Tinkerers Fund
→ Founded by: Soheil Feizi
⚫ LegalTech ⚫
🔶 5. Fearn, a platform that automates patent drafting, figure generation, and compliance workflows to help engineers and scientists produce patent filings faster and at lower cost, raised a $5.5M seed round.
→ Investors: Kindred Ventures a16z speedrun & others
→ Founded by: Han Kim, Angela Gao
🔶 6. Billables AI, a platform that automates time tracking and analyzes work activity data to generate billing records and operational insights for law firms, raised a $10.2M Series A round.
→ Investors: Avenue Growth Partner & others
→ Founded by: Arvind Sujeeth, Nancy Jeng
⚫ HealthTech ⚫
🔶 7. Uncovr, a platform that analyzes surgical and endoscopic video to generate operative reports and procedural billing codes for surgeons and hospitals, raised a $7M seed round.
→ Investors: Index Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Ines Iraki, Johann Diep, Eric Vibert, MD, PhD
⚫ Robotics ⚫
🔶 8. Kyber, a company developing real-time infrastructure for controlling robots, drones, and autonomous systems remotely, raised a $5M seed round.
→ Investors: Lightspeed Venture Partners & others
→ Founded by: Jean-Baptiste Kempf
⚫ FinTech ⚫
🔶 9. Capsa AI, a platform that organizes, searches, and analyzes investment data for private capital firms, raised an $18M Series A round.
→ Investors: TX Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Danyal Özdüzenciler, Callum Downie
⚫ Consumer ⚫
🔶 10. Odessia Travel, an AI-powered travel agent that allows users to plan and book entire trips in a single conversation, raised a $6M round.
→ Investors: Sequoia
→ Founded by: Francis Davidson
Huge congrats to everyone here! 🥂
PS: Track new VC fund announcements + full details here: https://lnkd.in/d7X8up9h
PPS: Join the weekly EverythingStartups newsletter for more on where early-stage capital is flowing across USA, Europe, and Israel: https://lnkd.in/dyNtt9s4
